member_findings.title: Worker discovery is untested
member_findings.impact: The new command depends on find_worker_pid to map the requested worker address to the right local process, but every run-path test mocks this method out. Regressions in pgrep invocation, dscli self-filtering, empty output handling, or multi-line process output would not fail any test even though they make dscli logs select the wrong log or fall back to stale defaults.
member_findings.fix: Add focused unit tests for find_worker_pid by mocking subprocess.check_output, covering a matching worker line, dscli self-match filtering, no-match CalledProcessError, timeout, and multiple pgrep rows.
